name: porter-codex-plugin
description: 个人 Codex solution-first 工作流插件

interface.longDescription: Porter Codex Plugin packages the solution-first personal AI development workflow as Codex skills, including solution planning, tasking, branch-name alignment, lifecycle guards, execution, review, commit message validation, documentation, and project configuration helpers.
defaultPrompt: Help me create a solution for this change.
Generate tasks for the active solution slice.
